programs.title: Four Letters of Love
programs.desc: Ireland.Margaret (Helena Bonham Carter) and Muiris (Gabriel Byrne) Gore have two children, Sean (Dónal Finn) and Isabel (Ann Skelly).The family's happiness is disturbed by the unexpected illness of their son.On another part of the island lives William Coughlan (Pierce Brosnan), who quit his job and left his loved ones to follow his dreams of being a painter.The fates of two families intertwine thanks to the Gore's daughter and the son of an unfulfilled artist, Nicholas (Fionn O'Shea).It turns out that young people are made for each other, even though they know nothing about each other.Destiny and the desire for love push them towards each other.Adaptation of the book of the same title by Niall Williams.

programs.title: BlacKkKlansman
programs.desc: Early 1970s, Colorado Springs, Colorado.Ron Stallworth (John David Washington) becomes the first black police officer in the department.After encountering manifestations of racism, he asks to be transferred to undercover work.He decides to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan, but for this he will need the help of an older, white colleague - Flip Zimmerman (Adam Driver).Ron calls representatives of a racist militia on the phone, and Flip meets with them directly.The police obtain information about the Klan's planned attack.Ron contacts David Duke (Topher Grace), the Grand Wizard of the Ku Klux Klan, by phone.Soon, Flip is accepted into the organization.Spike Lee's film won an Oscar for best adapted screenplay in 2019.Starring: versatile supporting actor Adam Driver ("What's Up, Davis?", "Silence") and former American football player John David Washington, Denzel Washington's son, nominated for a Golden Globe for this role.

actor: Master Patrolman Andy Landers - Frederick Weller

programs.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programs.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programs.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programs.title: The Last Vermeer
programs.desc: The Netherlands after World War II.The accountability of Nazi criminals and their accomplices continues.A Jew, Joseph Piller (Claes Bang), who fought in the resistance movement, is to deal with the case of stolen works of art.He accuses the eccentric painter Han van Meegeren (Guy Pearce) of collaboration, who hosted Germans at his hedonistic parties and sold them valuable paintings.The artist faces a death sentence.However, he claims that he traded in fakes he created.His exquisitely crafted fakes are indistinguishable from the originals.Although the evidence points to van Meegeren's guilt, and accepting his version would make the brilliant forger a national hero, Piller begins to believe him.Together with her assistant (Vicky Krieps), she tries to prove his innocence, putting her career and good name on the line.Based on facts, the extraordinary story of a Dutch painter and one of the best art forgers in history.It was based on the biography of Han van Meegeren by Jonathan Lopez.

programs.title: You're Cordially Invited
programs.desc: A booking error causes two weddings to take place in one place at the same time.Both families face the challenge of having to share space.However, they have no intention of letting anything stop them from organizing a special ceremony for their loved one.Jim (Will Ferrell), the father of Jenni (Geraldine Viswanathan), who is getting ready to get married, and Margot (Reese Witherspoon), the sister of the second bride, Neve (Meredith Hagner), try to maintain their composure in a difficult situation, but they are still fighting a desperate duel with each other.A comedy directed by Nicholas Stoller, the creator of "Neighbors".
